title: Akzo Nobel India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Akzo Nobel India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!
